report_name: Ransomware Attack on Dutch Health-Tech Giant ChipSoft Disrupts 70% of Hospitals

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The core of the attack on ChipSoft involved encrypting critical systems and data to disrupt operations, which is characteristic of a ransomware attack.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: The attackers likely deleted backups and volume shadow copies to inhibit system recovery, a common ransomware tactic. The report recommends monitoring for commands such as 'vssadmin.exe delete shadows'.

identities.name: ChipSoft
identities.description: A dominant Dutch provider of electronic health record (EHR) software that was the primary victim of a ransomware attack, leading to widespread disruption in the nation's healthcare system.

identities.name: Sint Jans Gasthuis
identities.description: One of the Dutch hospitals that took its patient portals offline as a precaution following the ransomware attack on its software supplier, ChipSoft.

identities.name: Laurentius Hospital
identities.description: One of the Dutch hospitals that took its patient portals offline as a precaution following the ransomware attack on its software supplier, ChipSoft.

identities.name: Leiden University Medical Center
identities.description: A Dutch university hospital that postponed a major system rollout due to the ransomware incident at its software vendor, ChipSoft.

identities.name: Flevo Hospital
identities.description: A Dutch hospital affected by the supply chain ransomware attack on its software provider, ChipSoft.

identities.name: Dutch Hospitals
identities.description: The class of victims affected by the supply chain attack on ChipSoft, with 70-80% of hospitals in the Netherlands using the vendor's systems.

indicators.name: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: VSSAdmin Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 2b8a1b9c-7d3e-4f6a-8b9c-1d2e3f4a5b6c
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common technique used by ransomware to inhibit system recovery.
references:
  - https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/healthcare-it-solutions-provider-chipsoft-hit-by-ransomware-attack/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-09
modified: 2026-04-09
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate administrative activity, though rare.
level: high
indicators.description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common technique used by ransomware to inhibit system recovery, as mentioned in the article's detection recommendations.
